# 3dkaarkhana 3D Printing & Prototyping Website

Static Jekyll website for 3dkaarkhana, a 3D printing and rapid prototyping service provider.

## Local development

1. `bundle install`
2. `bundle exec jekyll serve`
3. Visit `http://127.0.0.1:4000`

## Deployment

- GitHub Actions workflow available at `.github/workflows/jekyll.yml`
- Auto-deploys on push to `main` to GitHub Pages from `_site`
